args.content:
Hawaii Packing List
Emma Johnson's Vacation
June 10th - June 20th, 2024

--- Clothing & Accessories ---
☐ Swimwear (at least 2-3 sets)
☐ Cover-ups / beach dresses
☐ Casual outfits (shorts, t-shirts, tank tops)
☐ Lightweight sundresses
☐ Hiking gear (sturdy pants, moisture-wicking shirts)
☐ Comfortable walking shoes / sneakers
☐ Sandals / flip-flops
☐ Water shoes (for snorkeling & kayaking)
☐ Hat / visor for sun protection
☐ Light jacket or sweater (evenings can be cooler)
☐ Luau outfit / nice casual attire
☐ Sleepwear
☐ Underwear and socks

--- Beach & Water Activities ---
☐ Sunscreen (reef-safe, SPF 50+)
☐ Sunglasses (polarized)
☐ Snorkeling gear (mask, snorkel, fins) or plan to rent
☐ Rash guard / swim shirt
☐ Dry bag / waterproof pouch for phone
☐ Beach towel
☐ Beach bag
☐ Water bottle / hydration pack

--- Hiking & Outdoor ---
☐ Hiking boots or sturdy trail shoes
☐ Backpack / daypack
☐ Insect repellent
☐ First aid kit
☐ Flashlight or headlamp

--- Electronics ---
☐ Camera (underwater camera or GoPro recommended)
☐ Smartphone & charger
☐ Portable power bank
☐ Headphones / earbuds
☐ Travel adapter (if needed)

--- Health & Personal Care ---
☐ Lip balm with SPF
☐ After-sun lotion / aloe vera
☐ Personal toiletries (shampoo, conditioner, body wash)
☐ Medications / prescription drugs
☐ Motion sickness pills (for boat/road trips)
☐ Hand sanitizer
☐ Wet wipes

--- Important Documents ---
☐ Passport / ID (if traveling internationally)
☐ Travel insurance documents
☐ Flight confirmation / e-tickets
☐ Hotel / accommodation reservations
☐ Car rental confirmation
☐ Driver's license
☐ Credit cards / cash
☐ Travel itinerary printed copy

--- Miscellaneous ---
☐ Reusable shopping bag (for shopping trips)
☐ Book or e-reader (for relaxation/spa day)
☐ Snacks for road trips
☐ Laundry bag
☐ Luggage locks
